news.t: Beyond the AI Boom: Human Infrastructure Exposure With 3 ETFs
Some US investors pivot to infrastructure amid broader AI selloff
Impax Asset Management Converts Global Sustainable Infrastructure Fund to ETF, Launching Firm's First Exchange-Traded Fund

holdings.infoBox: BLDX is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Union Pacific stock at 5.34%, American Water Works Company at 4.60%, Elia Group at 3.94%, NextEra Energy at 3.75%, and Iberdrola at 3.54%.

overview.description: The Impax Global Sustainable Infrastructure ETF (BLDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed global equity ETF focused on companies providing essential infrastructure across developed and emerging markets. The fund targets capital appreciation and income through exposure to infrastructure themes such as energy, utilities, and transportation. BLDX was launched on Feb 2, 2026 and is issued by Impax.

data.title: Beyond the AI Boom: Human Infrastructure Exposure With 3 ETFs
data.text: In the 24-hour financial news cycle, there's much buzz surrounding the buildout of infrastructure for artificial intelligence (AI). What about infrastructure beneficial to humans?

data.title: Some US investors pivot to infrastructure amid broader AI selloff
data.text: As Wall Street's love affair with artificial intelligence heavyweights cools, some investors are pivoting to infrastructure companies they expect to benefit from AI capital spending, a shift that is s...

data.title: Impax Asset Management Converts Global Sustainable Infrastructure Fund to ETF, Launching Firm's First Exchange-Traded Fund
data.text: PORTSMOUTH, N.H.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Impax Asset Management today announced the Impax Global Infrastructure ETF (NYSE: BLDX), expanding access to its sustainable infrastructure strategy.
